text: Let me send that as the third turn through the proxy:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9999 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -c -p \"Pick the most complex function you found and suggest a refactoring to simplify it. Don't make the change, just explain what you'd do.\" 2>&1", "description": "Turn 3: suggest refactoring", "timeout": 120000}
